seoTitle: GeneSiC Solutions | EV, Aerospace, Industrial | BeiLuo
seoDescription: Explore GeneSiC power solutions for electric vehicles, aerospace systems, and industrial applications. SiC and GaN reference designs.

faqs.question: What solution categories does GeneSiC offer?
faqs.answer: GeneSiC offers comprehensive power solutions across three key categories: Electric Vehicle solutions including traction inverters, onboard chargers, and DC-DC converters utilizing SiC MOSFETs for maximum efficiency; Aerospace solutions featuring radiation-tolerant power converters and satellite power systems; and Industrial Power solutions encompassing motor drives, power supplies, and renewable energy systems. Each solution includes reference designs, evaluation kits, and comprehensive technical documentation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our solution categories below or contact our FAE team for customized solution recommendations.

faqs.question: Are GeneSiC solutions suitable for aerospace applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, GeneSiC excels in aerospace: (1) Radiation tolerance - Devices tested for space missions. (2) Temperature - 200°C operation for harsh environments. (3) Reliability - AS9100 certified manufacturing. (4) Heritage - Flight-proven in satellites. (5) Solutions - DC-DC converters, motor drives, power distribution. (6) Support - Dedicated aerospace FAE team. (7) Documentation - Full traceability and screening. GeneSiC is the trusted choice for aerospace power electronics.
faqs.decisionGuide: GeneSiC aerospace solutions are ideal for satellites, aircraft, and space missions.

faqs.question: Does GeneSiC provide reference designs for EV applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, GeneSiC provides comprehensive EV reference designs: (1) Traction inverters - Complete inverter designs with control. (2) Onboard chargers - 11kW and 22kW OBC designs. (3) DC-DC converters - HV to LV converters. (4) Documentation - Full schematics and BOM. (5) Software - Control algorithms included. (6) Automotive - AEC-Q101 qualified devices. (7) Support - FAE support for customization. Reference designs accelerate EV development.
faqs.decisionGuide: Start with GeneSiC reference designs to accelerate your EV power system development.

solutions.name: Electric Vehicle Powertrain
solutions.subtitle: High-Efficiency Traction Inverter Solutions
solutions.description: GeneSiC SiC MOSFETs enable next-generation EV traction inverters with industry-leading efficiency and power density for 400V and 800V systems.
solutions.longDescription:
The Electric Vehicle Powertrain from genesic represents a comprehensive approach to addressing modern challenges in Automotive. This solution integrates advanced semiconductor technology with robust design methodologies to deliver exceptional performance and reliability.

At the core of this solution is a carefully selected portfolio of genesic components optimized for the target application. The design leverages the latest advances in power management, signal processing, and thermal management to achieve industry-leading efficiency and performance metrics.

Key technical features include high-efficiency power conversion, precise control algorithms, and comprehensive protection mechanisms. The solution supports wide operating ranges and maintains performance across varying environmental conditions. Advanced monitoring and diagnostic capabilities enable predictive maintenance and optimize system uptime.

Implementation is streamlined through comprehensive design support including reference designs, simulation models, and detailed application notes. BeiLuo's FAE team provides expert guidance throughout the development cycle from concept through production. Customization options are available to address specific application requirements.

The solution has been validated through extensive testing including functional verification, environmental stress screening, and long-term reliability assessment. Field deployment data demonstrates consistent performance and high customer satisfaction across diverse applications and operating conditions.
features: Complete reference designs with schematics and BOM

faeInsights.content: Based on extensive experience supporting customers with genesic Solution 1, this solution addresses critical design challenges through proven architecture. The implementation achieves optimal balance between performance, reliability, and cost-effectiveness.
recommendations: Contact BeiLuo FAE for design review

faqs.question: What power levels can GeneSiC EV traction inverters support?
faqs.answer: GeneSiC EV traction inverter power levels: (1) Compact EVs - 50-100kW using discrete devices. (2) Mid-size EVs - 100-200kW with parallel devices. (3) Full-size EVs - 200-300kW using high-current devices. (4) Performance EVs - 300kW+ with parallel configurations. (5) Voltage - 400V and 800V battery systems. (6) Scalability - Modular designs allow power scaling. GeneSiC solutions cover the full EV range.
faqs.decisionGuide: Select devices based on power level; 1700V for 800V systems.

faqs.question: How does GeneSiC SiC improve EV range?
faqs.answer: GeneSiC SiC EV range improvement: (1) Efficiency gain - 2-3% higher inverter efficiency. (2) Loss reduction - 70% lower switching losses. (3) Range impact - 5-10% improvement. (4) Temperature - Stable performance at high temperature. (5) Ruggedness - Reliable operation under stress. (6) System cost - Lower cooling requirements. SiC traction inverters maximize EV range.
faqs.decisionGuide: GeneSiC SiC provides 5-10% range improvement with enhanced reliability.

faqs.question: What makes GeneSiC trench-gate technology ideal for EV?
faqs.answer: Trench-gate advantages for EV: (1) Low Rds(on) - Reduced conduction losses. (2) Ruggedness - Enhanced short-circuit capability. (3) Temperature - 200°C for harsh automotive. (4) Reliability - Proven in extreme conditions. (5) Efficiency - Higher system efficiency. (6) Size - Smaller die for same current. (7) Support - Comprehensive automotive support. Trench-gate is superior for automotive.
faqs.decisionGuide: GeneSiC trench-gate technology is ideal for demanding EV applications.

faqs.question: What thermal management is required?
faqs.answer: EV traction inverter thermal design: (1) Liquid cooling - Typical for high-power. (2) Coolant - Water-glycol at 60-70°C. (3) Flow rate - 10-15 L/min for 200kW. (4) Thermal interface - High-performance material. (5) Heatsink - Optimized cold plate. (6) Temperature monitoring - NTC sensors. (7) Derating - Design for 175°C maximum. Proper thermal design ensures reliability.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use liquid cooling for >100kW; design for Tj < 175°C.

faqs.question: Does GeneSiC provide motor control software?
faqs.answer: Yes, GeneSiC provides motor control resources: (1) Control algorithms - FOC implementations. (2) Reference code - Example code for MCUs. (3) PWM strategies - Optimized for SiC. (4) Protection - Overcurrent, overvoltage. (5) Efficiency optimization - MTPA algorithms. (6) Documentation - Application notes. (7) Support - FAE assistance. Software resources accelerate development.
faqs.decisionGuide: Start with GeneSiC reference code; customize for your motor.

faqs.question: What safety standards do GeneSiC EV solutions meet?
faqs.answer: GeneSiC EV safety and reliability: (1) AEC-Q101 - Automotive qualification. (2) AS9100 - Aerospace quality. (3) Functional safety - ISO 26262 support. (4) PPAP - Full production approval. (5) Reliability - >1,000,000 hours MTBF. (6) Power cycling - 100,000+ cycles. (7) Traceability - Full lot traceability. GeneSiC meets highest standards.
faqs.decisionGuide: GeneSiC devices are fully qualified for automotive and aerospace.

faqs.question: What radiation tolerance do GeneSiC devices have?
faqs.answer: GeneSiC radiation tolerance: (1) Total dose - 100 krad(Si) tested. (2) Single event - SEE tested. (3) Displacement damage - DDD characterized. (4) Testing - Per MIL-STD-750. (5) Heritage - Flight-proven in satellites. (6) Screening - Enhanced available. (7) Documentation - Full radiation data. GeneSiC devices are space-qualified.
faqs.decisionGuide: GeneSiC radiation-tolerant devices are ideal for satellite applications.

faqs.question: What temperature range can GeneSiC devices operate?
faqs.answer: GeneSiC temperature capability: (1) Standard - -55°C to +175°C. (2) Extended - Up to +200°C. (3) Aerospace - Full military temperature range. (4) Reliability - Stable at extremes. (5) Derating - Minimal at high temperature. (6) Testing - Full temperature characterization. (7) Applications - Harsh environments. GeneSiC excels in extreme temperatures.

faqs.question: What certifications does GeneSiC have for aerospace?
faqs.answer: GeneSiC aerospace certifications: (1) AS9100 - Quality management. (2) MIL-PRF-38534 - Hybrid microcircuits. (3) MIL-STD-750 - Test methods. (4) MIL-STD-883 - Environmental tests. (5) Traceability - Full lot tracking. (6) Screening - Enhanced per customer. (7) Documentation - Full certification package. GeneSiC meets all aerospace standards.
faqs.decisionGuide: GeneSiC is fully certified for aerospace applications.

faqs.question: Can GeneSiC provide custom solutions for aerospace?
faqs.answer: Yes, GeneSiC offers custom solutions: (1) Screening - Enhanced per MIL-STD. (2) Packaging - Custom hermetic packages. (3) Testing - Additional radiation testing. (4) Documentation - Custom data packages. (5) Support - Dedicated aerospace FAE. (6) Lead time - Extended for custom. (7) Volume - Low to high volume. Contact FAE for custom requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact aerospace FAE for custom screening and packaging options.

faqs.question: What aerospace applications use GeneSiC devices?
faqs.answer: GeneSiC aerospace applications: (1) Satellites - Solar array drives, power systems. (2) Launch vehicles - Actuator drives, power distribution. (3) Aircraft - Motor drives, power conversion. (4) Spacecraft - DC-DC converters, thrusters. (5) Rovers - Motor control, power management. (6) Drones - Compact power systems. (7) Defense - Rugged power electronics. GeneSiC serves all aerospace markets.
faqs.decisionGuide: GeneSiC devices are used in satellites, aircraft, and space missions.

faqs.question: What support does GeneSiC provide for aerospace customers?
faqs.answer: GeneSiC aerospace support: (1) FAE team - Dedicated aerospace engineers. (2) Radiation data - Complete test reports. (3) Design review - Schematic and layout. (4) Qualification - Support for customer qual. (5) Documentation - Full data packages. (6) Training - Technical workshops. (7) Long-term - Obsolescence support. Comprehensive aerospace support.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact GeneSiC aerospace FAE for dedicated support.

solutions.title: genesic Solution 2
EV Traction Inverter Solution
solutions.subtitle: High-efficiency SiC-based traction inverter for electric vehicles
solutions.description: Complete traction inverter solution using GeneSiC 1700V SiC MOSFETs for EV powertrain applications with industry-leading efficiency and power density.
solutions.longDescription: The EV Traction Inverter Solution leverages GeneSiC's AEC-Q101 qualified 1700V SiC MOSFETs to deliver exceptional efficiency and power density for electric vehicle powertrains. This solution enables compact, lightweight inverter designs with reduced cooling requirements.
solutions.name: EV Traction Inverter Solution
